title: Phoenix Platform Foundation
description: Elixir 1.18.3 + Phoenix 1.8.3 + LiveView 1.1.0. Binary UUID PKs, PostgreSQL 18, Azure Container Apps deployment. Oban for background jobs, HEEx templates throughout.

title: Session Authentication
description: Phoenix session auth: bcrypt password hashing, DB-backed UserToken schema, 60-day remember-me cookie. UserAuth plug with log_in_user/log_out_user. Live session on_mount guards: ensure_authenticated, redirect_if_user_is_authenticated.

title: Peptide Formulary
description: Formulary context with 8+ FDA Category 1 peptides. Tier badges (Tier 1/2/3), evidence levels (strong_clinical/promising_preclinical/emerging), category filters (GH Axis, Tissue Repair, Metabolic, Cognitive, Immune), slug-based routing.

title: Azure Deployment (v0.1.0)
description: az acr build cloud-side linux/amd64 build. Container App with migration job (peppy-migrate). Secrets via Container Apps secrets. ENV-based runtime config.

title: User Onboarding Flow
description: Multi-step onboarding LiveView capturing health goals, allergies, and medical history. Step progress indicator, form validation, redirect to /app on completion.

title: Authenticated Dashboard
description: Personalized /app dashboard with peptide recommendations, stack status cards, and upcoming consultation slots. Requires :ensure_authenticated on_mount.

title: Pepp Rally Stacks
description: Named peptide protocol stacks: Longevity Stack, Body Recomp Stack, Focus & Calm Stack. Stack builder with peptide associations, tier summary, and physician approval gate.

title: DevTools + UAT Panel
description: ?devtools=peppy-dev-local-2026 activation via DevtoolsGate plug. Session-persisted devtools_enabled propagated to all LiveViews via socket assigns. Quick login, UAT stories panel, dev API endpoints.

title: Pepp Talk (Consultations)
description: Physician consultation booking flow (telehealth). Calendar integration, physician matching, prescription review workflow. HIPAA-compliant session notes.

title: Stripe Billing
description: Subscription plans (Basic/Premium/Elite) via stripity_stripe ~>3.2. Webhook handlers, customer portal, usage-based add-ons for consultations.

title: Admin Portal
description: Peptide catalog management, user management, order tracking, consultation queue management. Role-gated /admin/* routes with AdminAuth plug.

title: iOS App (SwiftUI)
description: Native SwiftUI iOS app with formulary browser, personalized stack management, Pepp Talk consultation booking, push notifications, and biometric auth.
